ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* Trading days of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_exchanges" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Listing date of the instrument on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id", "exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trading session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of trading session (e.g., regular, extended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "time_period_end" TEXT /* End time of the time period */,
  "time_open" TEXT /* Time when the market opened */,
  "time_close" TEXT /* Time when the market closed */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total volume traded */,
  "trades_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades made */,
  "adjusted_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend" TEXT /* Dividend amount */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument traded */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the trade */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission paid for the trade */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees paid for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument ordered */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the order */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "filled_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument filled */,
  "filled_price" TEXT /* Price at which the order was filled */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for order cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "value" TEXT /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "cost_basis" TEXT /* Cost basis of the instrument */,
  "unrealized_gain" TEXT /* Unrealized gain/loss of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument related to the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument affected by the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earnings report, product launch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event (e.g., high, low, medium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the technical indicator */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_indicators_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market data (e.g., index, FX rate) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the market data */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the market data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
